import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class PeriodicConv2d(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, padding=1, stride=1):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=0)
        self.padding = padding
    
    def forward(self, x):
        x = F.pad(x, (self.padding, self.padding, 0, 0), mode='circular')
        x = self.conv(x)
        return x

class ResidualBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, channels):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv1 = PeriodicConv2d(channels, channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1)
        self.conv2 = PeriodicConv2d(channels, channels, kernel_size=3, padding=1)
        self.relu = nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        residual = x
        x = self.relu(self.conv1(x))
        x = self.conv2(x)
        x = x + residual
        x = self.relu(x)
        return x

class WeatherModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, hidden_channels=160, num_blocks=10):
        super().__init__()
        self.input_conv = PeriodicConv2d(6, hidden_channels, kernel_size=5, padding=2)
        self.relu = nn.ReLU(inplace=True)
        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([ResidualBlock(hidden_channels) for _ in range(num_blocks)])
        self.output_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_channels, 2, kernel_size=1)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        B, T, C, H, W = x.shape
        x = x.view(B, T * C, H, W)
        x = self.relu(self.input_conv(x))
        for block in self.blocks:
            x = block(x)
        x = self.output_conv(x)
        return x
